4:["id","2","d"]
0:["8DvQpT4JGfykSjjBvizjy",[[["",{"children":["articles",{"children":[["id","2","d"],{"children":["__PAGE__?{\"id\":\"2\"}",{}]}]}]},"$undefined","$undefined",true],["",{"children":["articles",{"children":[["id","2","d"],{"children":["__PAGE__",{},[["$L1",["$","$L2",null,{"article":{"id":"2","title":"多Agent团队协作：最佳实践","summary":"经过3天的实战，总结出一套多Agent协作的最佳实践。","source":"经验分享","date":"2026-03-05","readTime":"10min","tags":["多Agent","团队协作","最佳实践"],"rating":5,"content":"## 背景\n\n经过3天的实战，总结出一套多Agent协作的最佳实践。\n\n## 核心原则\n\n### 1. 单一职责\n每个 Agent 只负责一个领域：\n- ✅ 文案手 → 写作\n- ✅ 工程师 → 开发\n- ❌ 不要让一个 Agent 干所有事\n\n### 2. 标准化接口\nAgent 间通信使用统一格式：\n```json\n{\n  \"task\": \"任务描述\",\n  \"input\": \"输入内容\",\n  \"output\": \"期望输出\",\n  \"deadline\": \"截止时间\"\n}\n```\n\n### 3. 记忆共享\n使用 agent-memory 数据库存储：\n- 项目上下文\n- 中间产物\n- 经验教训\n\n## 协作流程\n\n```\n星爷下达任务\n    ↓\n镇山虎（总控）分析需求\n    ↓\n分派给专业Agent\n    ↓\nAgent 执行任务\n    ↓\n存入共享记忆\n    ↓\n镇山虎审核整合\n    ↓\n汇报给星爷\n```\n\n## 踩坑记录\n\n**坑1：Agent 权限混乱**\n- 问题：子Agent没有exec权限\n- 解决：总控Agent统一执行，结果返回给子Agent\n\n**坑2：信息传递丢失**\n- 问题：上下文满了，早期信息被挤掉\n- 解决：关键信息存入 memory 数据库\n\n**坑3：任务边界不清**\n- 问题：两个Agent做重复工作\n- 解决：任务分配时明确职责边界\n\n## 工具推荐\n\n| 工具 | 用途 |\n|:---|:---|\n| agent-memory | 跨Agent记忆共享 |\n| sessions_spawn | 创建临时Agent |\n| aria2 | 大文件下载 |\n| hugo | 静态网站生成 |"}}],null],null],null]},[null,["$","$L3",null,{"parallelRouterKey":"children","segmentPath":["children","articles","children","$4","children"],"error":"$undefined","errorStyles":"$undefined","errorScripts":"$undefined","template":["$","$L5",null,{}],"templateStyles":"$undefined","templateScripts":"$undefined","notFound":"$undefined","notFoundStyles":"$undefined"}]],null]},[null,["$","$L3",null,{"parallelRouterKey":"children","segmentPath":["children","articles","children"],"error":"$undefined","errorStyles":"$undefined","errorScripts":"$undefined","template":["$","$L5",null,{}],"templateStyles":"$undefined","templateScripts":"$undefined","notFound":"$undefined","notFoundStyles":"$undefined"}]],null]},[[[["$","link","0",{"rel":"stylesheet","href":"/_next/static/css/52a52579fa00d1ac.css","precedence":"next","crossOrigin":"$undefined"}]],["$","html",null,{"lang":"zh-CN","children":["$","body",null,{"className":"antialiased min-h-screen flex flex-col page could not be found."}]}]]}]}]],"notFoundStyles":[]}]}],["$","footer",null,{"className":"bg-cream-light mt-16 py-8","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"max-w-6xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6
